parameters.query: SELECT key, value FROM app_settings WHERE key IN ('ai_base_url', 'ai_model');

=INSERT INTO viral_references (
  url, platform, title, description,
  view_count, like_count, duration_sec,
  tags, channel_name, upload_date, thumbnail_url,
  analysis, viral_score, hook_type, editing_style,
  status, analyzed_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.ctx.url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.ctx.platform }}',
  '{{ ($json.ctx.meta_title || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.ctx.meta_description || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.ctx.meta_view_count || 0 }},
  {{ $json.ctx.meta_like_count || 0 }},
  {{ $json.ctx.meta_duration || 0 }},
  ARRAY[{{ ($json.ctx.meta_tags || []).map(t => "'" + t.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') || "''" }}],
  '{{ ($json.ctx.meta_channel || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.ctx.meta_upload_date || '' }}',
  '{{ ($json.ctx.meta_thumbnail || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.analysis).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.viral_score }},
  '{{ $json.hook_type.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.editing_style.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'analyzed',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, url, viral_score, hook_type, status;
